message:
fix(safe_channel): resolve livelock in concurrent_reserve_drop_no_loss test

Threads 0/1 unconditionally dropped items where value % 3 == 0, but
rollback pushes items to the front of the queue. With the channel closed
(no new items), divisible-by-3 items cycled infinitely between reserve
and drop without ever reaching threads 2/3 for commit.

Fix: bound per-thread drop count to 50 and yield after drop to give
other threads a fair chance at the recycled item.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
